sub_modules.fir_pair_sum: Combinational symmetric sample pair adder for mirrored FIR taps.
sub_modules.fir_product: Combinational signed multiplier with one hard-coded Q15 FIR coefficient parameter.
sub_modules.fir_accumulator: Combinational signed 64-bit accumulator for all 51 symmetric FIR products.
sub_modules.fir_q15_quantizer: Combinational arithmetic Q15 normalization stage using signed right shift by 15.
